title: Arlon, Luxembourg — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Arlon, Luxembourg: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Arlon is a city in Luxembourg with a population of 30,000. The capital of Belgian Luxembourg, a bilingual (French-German) city near the Grand Duchy border with a charming historic center and Roman museum.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
